subject: WM-0177 blocked
body: Allocation-free GridPathfinder.findPathInto cannot be implemented within current allowedPaths: MapGrid.isCellPassableByIndex, canMoveBetweenCardinalNeighbors and readCellByIndex materialize result/cell objects per path node/neighbor, while map-grid.ts/tests are outside WM-0177 ownership. Removing only the final path/result allocation would leave WM-0170 blocked. Revise WM-0177 or add a strict predecessor for additive caller-owned/primitive MapGrid path facts. Evidence: coordination/reports/WM-0177-plan.md and coordination/reports/WM-0177.md.
